data.title: Crypto Today: Circle Makes NYSE Debut, JPMorgan Eyes Crypto ETF Loans, and Stablecoins Surge
data.description: Circle Goes Public on NYSE After $1.05B IPO BoostCircle, the issuer behind USD Coin (USDC) — the world’s second-largest stablecoin — officially began trading under ticker CRCL on the New York Stock Exchange (NYSE) today, June 5.The IPO was upsized several times due to strong investor demand, ultimately pricing 34 million shares at $31 each, valuing the company at $6.9 billion.Originally, Circle targeted 24 million shares at $24–$26. The final price range marked its third attempt to go public after delays in April due to Trump-era tariff fears.Circle CEO Jeremy Allaire called the listing a milestone for “upgrading the world to an internet-native financial system.”Industry leaders like Michael Saylor and Coinbase’s Paul Grewal congratulated the team on X.📈 Key Numbers:Shares offered: 34 millionIPO value: $1.05 billionValuation: $6.9 billionTicker: CRCLJPMorgan to Accept Crypto ETFs as Loan CollateralJPMorgan, the largest U.S. bank by assets, will reportedly allow clients to borrow against crypto ETFs in the coming weeks, according to Bloomberg (June 4).The initiative starts with BlackRock’s iShares Bitcoin Trust (IBIT) — currently the largest spot BTC ETF in the U.S. with $70.1B in net assets.This move signals growing institutional comfort with treating crypto-backed ETFs like traditional securities.Clients’ digital assets may now count toward net worth calculations for loan eligibility.🔍 Why It Matters:This marks a major leap in crypto's mainstream integration with traditional finance, allowing more liquidity options for wealthy investors holding digital assets.Today’s Crypto Market PulseStablecoins are in focus as Circle debuts on Wall Street, highlighting the rising importance of tokenized dollars in global finance.Ethereum’s resurgence as a DeFi and stablecoin hub continues, with $480B in stablecoin volume recorded in May.Bitcoin hovers near $104,800, with analysts citing tariff uncertainty as a key short-term risk.Key Takeaways for Crypto InvestorsEventImpactCircle NYSE DebutSignals growing trust in stablecoin-backed businessesJPMorgan's ETF Loan PlanEnhances crypto liquidity and wealth management use casesStablecoin AdoptionFuels Ethereum’s comeback and DeFi evolution

data.title: Bitcoin News: Bitcoin Hash Ribbons Flash Rare ‘Buy’ Signal for 3rd Time in 2025 — Is Another Rally Coming?
data.description: Hash Ribbons Turns Green: A Historically Accurate Bitcoin SignalThe Hash Ribbons indicator — a trusted long-term metric that tracks miner capitulation and recovery — has just flashed its third “buy” signal in 2025, according to CryptoQuant. Historically, this indicator has accurately identified market bottoms, signaling ideal entry points for long-term investors.The signal suggests that despite Bitcoin's recent all-time highs, current prices may still offer attractive long-term upside.CryptoQuant analyst Darkfost noted that the market has largely overlooked the signal, calling it a “smart move” to buy the dip now.How it works:Hash Ribbons measure the 30-day and 60-day moving averages of Bitcoin’s network hashrate. When the shorter-term average crosses above the longer one after a miner capitulation phase, it indicates that mining recovery is underway — often preceding upward price movement.Miner Behavior Supports Bullish OutlookBitcoin miner reserves are steady at ~1.8 million BTC as of June 4, suggesting reduced selling pressure after aggressive distribution in 2024.The Bitcoin hashrate has reached new all-time highs, confirming strong network security and miner confidence.Why It Matters:Miners often act as early indicators of market strength or weakness. When they hold rather than sell, it hints at expectation of further price increases.Profit-Taking Fades Amid Market MaturityWhile some Bitcoin whales and long-term holders have locked in profits, Glassnode’s latest onchain report reveals that profit-taking euphoria is fading:The 90-day average of realized profits shows that BTC holders are becoming more strategic and less emotional, signaling a maturing market with lower volatility.“Profit-taking is now less intense than in past cycles,” Glassnode noted. “This trend shows more nuanced, less euphoric behavior as Bitcoin grows into a major macro asset.”BTC Market Outlook: Key TakeawaysSignal/EventImplicationHash Ribbons Buy SignalIndicates strong long-term accumulation opportunityMiner Reserves SteadyReduced sell pressure supports price stabilityRecord HashrateSignals confidence and resilience in the Bitcoin networkDiminished Profit-TakingSuggests market maturity and measured optimism With BTC trading near $104,768, all eyes are on macro factors — including tariff uncertainty and potential Fed rate cuts — to determine whether this Hash Ribbons signal precedes another major leg up.Next Key Level: Watch for sustained consolidation above $105K to confirm bullish continuation, according to Cointelegraph.

data.title: Analyst: Trump's tax bill could cost Tesla $1.2 billion
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily reported that by the end of this year, Trump's huge tax bill will largely eliminate the tax credit of up to $7,500 for some Tesla models and other electric vehicle buyers, seven years earlier than originally planned. Analysts at JPMorgan Chase said this would deal a blow to Tesla's full-year profits of about $1.2 billion. After leaving his official White House adviser position last week, Musk has been preventing the president from signing the tax bill, which he called "disgusting." Musk has been lobbying Republican lawmakers-including a direct appeal to House Speaker Johnson to keep electric vehicle tax credits in the legislation. (Jinshi)

data.title: Circle's IPO Pricing Set at $31 Amid Stock Price Predictions
data.description: According to PANews, Circle, a leading stablecoin company, is expected to see its stock price open between $42 and $44. The initial public offering (IPO) has been priced at $31. This development follows reports from Jinshi, highlighting the anticipated market performance of Circle's shares.

data.title: Ethereum Weekly Active Addresses Reach Record High
data.description: According to PANews, Ethereum has achieved a new milestone in its network activity. Data from unfolded indicates that the number of weekly active addresses on the Ethereum network has surpassed 17 million. This marks a 16.95% increase compared to the previous week, setting a new record for the platform's ecosystem engagement.

Daily realized gains reached $1. 47 billion, mainly from holders with over a year of. . .

data.title: James Wynn is just $40 away from being liquidated in tonight’s BTC drop
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to Lookonchain monitoring, trader James Wynn deposited about 74,000 USDC to Hyperliquid in time before the Bitcoin price fell, reducing its liquidation price to $103,859, successfully avoiding liquidation risks. During this decline, the price of Bitcoin on the Hyperliquid platform hit a low of $103,899, only $40 higher than its liquidation price.

data.title: Xi Jinping Emphasizes Steering U.S.-China Relations Amid Challenges
data.description: According to Odaily, during a conversation between U.S. President Donald Trump and Chinese President Xi Jinping, Xi highlighted the importance of steering the course of U.S.-China relations. He stressed the need to maintain direction and eliminate various disturbances or disruptions, which he deemed crucial for the relationship's stability.

data.title: Xi Jinping and U.S. President Trump Discuss Trade Relations
data.description: According to BlockBeats, Chinese President Xi Jinping and U.S. President Donald Trump held a phone conversation, during which Xi highlighted the significance of recent trade talks in Geneva. Initiated at the suggestion of the U.S., these discussions mark a crucial step towards resolving trade issues through dialogue and negotiation. The talks have been widely welcomed by both nations and the international community, underscoring that dialogue and cooperation are the only viable paths forward. Xi emphasized the importance of utilizing the established trade consultation mechanisms, advocating for an approach based on equality and mutual respect to achieve a win-win outcome. China remains committed to this process with sincerity and principles.

data.title: Plume Network announces the launch of its public mainnet, Plume Genesis, now hosting $150 million in RWA capital
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to official news, Plume Network announced today the launch of its public mainnet Plume Genesis. Plume Genesis brings on-chain RWAs including Superstate, Blackstone, and Invesco, with more than $150 million in RWA capital mobilized in various use cases; sufficient liquidity in multiple asset classes; and more than 200 projects have been announced in its ecosystem. The ecosystem includes a large number of RWA native and blue-chip DeFi applications such as Morpho, Curve, Orderly, Matrixdock, Lorenzo, Rooster, Solera, and Mystic.
Plume focuses on bringing RWA to the chain, and the network is committed to carrying more than $4 billion in assets.
In the future, Plume will introduce multiple asset classes and RWAfi use cases to its ecosystem, including tokenized art, precious metals, motorcycles, uranium, and trading cards, thereby broadening the scope of application of RWA on-chain utility.

data.title: Content of the call between the Chinese and US heads of state: The US should withdraw its negative measures against China
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Xi Jinping said in a phone call between the Chinese and American heads of state: The Chinese people always keep their promises and fulfill their actions. Now that a consensus has been reached, both sides should abide by it. After the Geneva talks, China seriously implemented the agreement. The US should look at the progress made in a realistic way and withdraw the negative measures it has taken against China. The two sides should enhance exchanges in various fields such as diplomacy, economy and trade, military, and law enforcement, enhance consensus, reduce misunderstandings, and strengthen cooperation. (CCTV News)

data.title: Content of the call between the Chinese and US heads of state: Both sides should make good use of the established economic and trade consultation mechanism to strive for a win-win result
data.description: During the phone call between the Chinese and American heads of state, Xi Jinping pointed out that, based on the proposal of the US side, the economic and trade leaders of the two countries held talks in Geneva, which was an important step in resolving economic and trade issues through dialogue and consultation. It was widely welcomed by all sectors of the two countries and the international community, and it also proved that dialogue and cooperation are the only correct choice. Both sides should make good use of the established economic and trade consultation mechanism, uphold an equal attitude, respect each other's concerns, and strive for a win-win result. In this regard, China is sincere and principled. (CCTV News)

data.title: CBO says Trump’s Big Beautiful bill adds $2.4 trillion to debt – GOP calls it a coordinated attack
data.description:
The Congressional Budget Office (CBO) said on Wednesday that Trump’s “One Big Beautiful Bill” would increase the US federal deficit by $2. 4 trillion over ten years. The proposal, a centerpiece of his domestic agenda, includes over $3. 7 trillion in tax cuts and $1. 3 trillion in spending reductions, but the math isn’t lining up. The nonpartisan […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/cbo-says-trump-bill-2-4-trillion-to-debt/

data.title: Content of the call between the Chinese and American heads of state: It is particularly important to correct the Sino-US relationship and eliminate interference and sabotage
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: In a phone call between the Chinese and American heads of state, Xi Jinping pointed out that to correct the course of the Sino-US relationship, we need to steer the ship well and set the direction, especially to eliminate all kinds of interference and even sabotage, which is particularly important. (CCTV News)

data.title: Bitcoin Flashing Bearish Signal After Failing To Break Above Major Resistance, Says Crypto Trader – Here Are His Targets
data.description:
A closely followed crypto strategist believes that Bitcoin (BTC) is on the verge of a pullback after facing resistance at a key level. Analyst Justin Bennett tells his 115,600 followers on the social media platform X that Bitcoin may be forming a bear flag pattern and decline more than 7% of its current value.
source: https://dailyhodl.com/2025/06/05/bitcoin-flashing-bearish-signal-after-failing-to-break-above-major-resistance-says-crypto-trader-here-are-his-targets/
